title: No Beds
description: This mod removes all beds from Minecraft, making sleeping impossible and forcing you to face the night every time. It makes the game harder, changes how you explore, and gives the world a more dangerous, nonstop survival vibe.
body: This mod completely takes beds out of Minecraft, so you can’t skip the night or set a spawn point anymore. You have to survive every night the long way mobs, darkness, everything. It changes the whole feel of the game, making exploration riskier and death more intense since you always respawn at world spawn. It’s simple, but it makes the game way more hardcore.
